name: sk-prompt-small-model
description: Sentinel for small-model optimization patterns covering SWE-1.6 + DeepSeek-v4-pro + Kimi-k2.6 + Qwen3.6 + GLM-5.1 + MiniMax across cli-devin and cli-opencode (DeepSeek API + opencode-go + MiniMax Token Plan minimax-coding-plan default / MiniMax Direct API minimax) dispatch paths. Points at real patterns in cli-devin/references/ and cli-opencode/references/ while giving the skill advisor one discoverable routing anchor for small-model dispatch.
trigger_examples: use cli-devin for SWE-1.6 code review with output verification
what is the small-model output verification pattern
route Kimi-k2.6 through cli-opencode opencode-go with a context budget
dispatch DeepSeek-v4-pro through DeepSeek API direct
run GLM-5.1 via cli-devin Cognition Pro with structured permissions
check structured permissions before DeepSeek-v4-pro dispatch
dispatch MiniMax via the Token Plan minimax-coding-plan default
